home.hero_title:

木纹转印纸
home.hero_title_en:

home.hero_desc: 佛山彩信装饰材料厂，专注木纹转印纸生产与定制服务。产品广泛应用于室内房间门、铝型材喷涂等领域。3000㎡现代化工厂，为客户提供优质的转印解决方案。
home.hero_desc_en: Foshan Caixin Decorative Materials Factory specializes in the production and customization of wood grain transfer paper. With a 3000㎡ modern factory, we provide premium transfer solutions.
home.about_desc: 佛山彩信装饰材料厂成立于2015年，是一家专业从事木纹转印纸研发、生产和销售的企业。工厂位于佛山市，拥有3000多平方米的现代化生产基地。
home.about_desc_en: Founded in 2015, Foshan Caixin Decorative Materials Factory is a professional enterprise in R&D, production and sales of wood grain transfer paper.
home.about_desc2: 我们拥有先进的凹版印刷机1台、高速数码打印机10台，年产量达数百万平方米。产品广泛应用于室内门、铝型材等领域，畅销国内外市场。
home.about_desc2_en: We own 1 advanced gravure printing machine and 10 high-speed digital printers with an annual output of millions of square meters.
home.cta_title_en: Need Custom Wood Grain Transfer Paper?
home.cta_desc: 无论您需要标准产品还是个性化定制，我们都为您提供专业解决方案
home.cta_desc_en: Whether you need standard products or custom solutions, we provide professional solutions for you.

about.intro_p1: 佛山彩信装饰材料厂成立于2015年，是一家专业从事木纹转印纸研发、生产和销售的高新技术企业。公司位于广东省佛山市，依托粤港澳大湾区优越的地理位置和产业配套优势，致力于为客户提供高品质的木纹转印产品和解决方案。
about.intro_p1_en: Foshan Caixin Decorative Materials Factory, founded in 2015, is a high-tech enterprise specializing in R&D, production and sales of wood grain transfer paper. Located in Foshan City, Guangdong Province.
about.intro_p2: 经过多年的发展，公司已拥有3000多平方米的现代化标准厂房，配备先进的凹版印刷设备和数码打印生产线。产品广泛应用于室内房间门、铝型材喷涂等领域，以稳定的品质和优质的服务赢得了广大客户的信赖。
about.intro_p2_en: After years of development, the company has over 3,000 square meters of modern standard factory buildings, equipped with advanced gravure printing equipment and digital printing production lines.
about.gravure_desc: 1台高性能凹版印刷机，用于大批量标准产品的规模化生产，印刷精度高、色彩饱满
about.gravure_desc_en: 1 high-performance gravure printing machine for large-scale production with high printing precision and vibrant colors
about.digital_desc: 10台高速数码打印机，支持小批量多品种定制生产，灵活高效，满足个性化需求
about.digital_desc_en: 10 high-speed digital printers supporting small-batch, multi-variety customized production
about.laminate_desc: 配套覆膜设备，确保转印纸表面保护层均匀一致，提升产品耐用性
about.laminate_desc_en: Supporting lamination equipment for uniform surface protection layer
about.testing_desc: 完善的品质检测设备，严格把控每一批次产品的质量指标
about.testing_desc_en: Comprehensive quality testing equipment for every batch

footer.desc: 佛山彩信装饰材料厂 — 专业木纹转印纸生产厂家，致力于为客户提供高品质的转印产品和定制服务。
footer.desc_en: Foshan Caixin Decorative Materials Factory — Professional manufacturer of wood grain transfer paper.
